name: PathGuard
description: Dynamic file path management via symlink indirection. Prevents broken media links when files are moved or renamed.
author: Trevor May

commands.name: Scan Project
commands.description: Scan the active project for new media imports

commands.name: Get Status
commands.description: Get PathGuard tracking status for the current project

commands.name: Reconcile Symlinks
commands.description: Verify and repair all managed symlinks against DB state

scanInterval.label: Scan Interval (ms)
scanInterval.description: How often to poll the project tree for new imports

symlinkRoot.label: Symlink Directory
symlinkRoot.description: Root directory where managed symlinks are created

watchPaths.label: Watch Paths
watchPaths.description: Comma-separated directories for the daemon to monitor for file moves

refreshMediaAfterRelink.label: Refresh Media After Relink
refreshMediaAfterRelink.description: Call refreshMedia() after changeMediaPath(). Disable if causing issues in your Premiere version.
